gatewayRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

welcome.title: Welcome to ItemClaw
welcome.subtitle: Your AI assistant is ready. Start a conversation below.
welcome.firstTimeHint: To use the ticket system, make sure the Unis Ticket skill is enabled in Skills and your token is configured. First-time responses may take a moment while skills load.
